outlier_sessions.description: Four sessions excluded from Table 1 statistics. Excluded on basis of anomalous delta mean magnitude relative to trial block mean, not on basis of sign result.
outlier_sessions.exclusion_criterion: Delta mean magnitude more than 3 SD below trial block mean in absolute value, confirmed by positioning inspection.

sessions.exclusion_reason: Photograph partially outside detection region. 6.1 SD below block mean in absolute value.
sessions.adversarial_note: Correctly rejected by spatial_variance criterion (516 > 400) despite positive sign.

sessions.exclusion_reason: Anomalous spatial variance drop mid-block (2186 vs block mean 2830). Photograph shifted position.
Same block shift. Spatial variance anomalously low.
First run of first block; screen not yet in position.
sessions.adversarial_note: Correctly rejected by spatial_variance criterion (2839 > 400) despite positive sign.

warmup_characterization.conclusion: No warmup condition tested produces false acceptance. 10-frame warmup validated as sufficient.
